## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

### Type of change

-   [ ] Refactor
-   [ ] Feature
-   [ ] Bug Fix
-   [ ] Optimization
-   [ ] Documentation Update

### Closes following JIRA ticket(s) :

-
-

### Checklist:

-   [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
-   [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
-   [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the console
-   [ ] I have navigated the changed sections with the network tab open to ensure no duplicate requests are made
-   [ ] If my PR includes UI changes, I have checked that the mobile, tablet and desktop version of my changes are fine and do not introduce UI glitches.
-   [ ] If my PR adds images or assets to the project, I have minified the assets and made sure that the size was reasonable.
-   [ ] If my PR concerns an existing production feature, I have checked that my changes do not break existing features in all the parts where it is used (consult with teammate if unsure).

### My pull request involves database schema changes :

-   [ ] Yes
-   [ ] No

### Screenshots of UI changes

Please include screenshots of UI changes including Desktop and Mobile views

## Additional comments

Please include any additional comments, questions or post-deployment tasks that need to be performed.
